ddls:
CREATE TABLE "servers" (
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each server */,
  "server_name" TEXT /* Name of the server */,
  "server_type" TEXT /* Type of the server (e.g., cloudflare, apache) */,
  "os_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the operating system used by the server */,
  "last_seen" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the server was seen or checked */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the server */,
  "netblock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the netblock associated with the server */,
  "server_status" TEXT /* Current status of the server */,
  "server_location" TEXT /* Physical location of the server */,
  "server_environment" TEXT /* Environment the server is in */,
  "server_created_date" TEXT /* Date the server was created */,
  "server_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the server was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("server_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_servers_os_id FOREIGN KEY ("os_id") REFERENCES operating_systems ("os_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_servers_netblock_id FOREIGN KEY ("netblock_id") REFERENCES netblocks ("netblock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operating_systems" (
  "os_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operating system */,
  "os_name" TEXT /* Name of the operating system */,
  "os_version" TEXT /* Version of the operating system */,
  "os_architecture" TEXT /* Architecture of the operating system */,
  "os_vendor" TEXT /* Vendor of the operating system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("os_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "netblocks" (
  "netblock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each netblock */,
  "netblock_name" TEXT /* Name or range of the netblock */,
  "netblock_owner" TEXT /* Owner of the netblock */,
  "netblock_cidr" TEXT /* CIDR notation for the netblock */,
  "netblock_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the netblock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("netblock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_centers" (
  "data_center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data center */,
  "data_center_name" TEXT /* Name of the data center */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the data center */,
  "data_center_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the data center */,
  "data_center_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the data center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "server_data_center" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each server-data center mapping */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the server */,
  "data_center_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data center */,
  "mapping_created_date" TEXT /* Date the server was mapped to the data center */,
  "mapping_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the server's data center mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_server_data_center_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_server_data_center_data_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_center_id") REFERENCES data_centers ("data_center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "server_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the server the log is associated with */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of the log */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message of the log */,
  "log_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Log level */,
  "log_category" TEXT /* Log category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_server_logs_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* User's password */,
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_user_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "server_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the server being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the server */,
  "access_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used to access the server */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_server_access_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_server_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "server_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update record */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the server the update is associated with */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of the update */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the update was applied */,
  "update_status" TEXT /* Status of the update */,
  "update_started_date" TEXT /* Date the update started */,
  "update_completed_date" TEXT /* Date the update was completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_server_updates_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "server_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the server the metric is associated with */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "metric_threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_server_metrics_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "server_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the server the alert is associated with */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "alert_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert */,
  "alert_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_server_alerts_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "server_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration setting */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the server the configuration is associated with */,
  "config_key" TEXT /* Key of the configuration setting */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration setting */,
  "config_description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration setting */,
  "config_status" TEXT /* Status of the configuration */,
  "config_type" TEXT /* Type of the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_server_configurations_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission is associated with */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
